title: eleocharis cylindrica
intro: Eleocharis cylindrica, also known as cylindrical spike rush or Chinese spike rush, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). This aquatic plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis cylindrica include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis cylindrica include dried roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
